title: GDK reported error, BATproject: does not match always when running queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, product_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, quantity INT CHECK (quantity >= 0), price DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO sales (product_name, quantity, price) VALUES ('Widget', 10, 19.99);
INSERT INTO sales (product_name, quantity, price) VALUES ('Gadget', 5, 29.99);
SELECT product_name, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM sales GROUP BY product_name HAVING total_quantity > 0;
DELETE FROM sales WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent query results after data manipulation operations
